role_summary: Civil Rights History Project interviewee; co-subject of a joint oral history with James Miller (catalog entry 12, not-auditable tier).
ai_reading: Carolyn Miller shares the embedding signature of the joint oral history at entry 12 (catalog slug 'carolyn-miller-and-james-miller'); see that catalog page for the substrate-derived neighbor cluster and axis observations the embedding produces for the combined transcript. Individual cosines for each named subject of a joint interview are not separable from the precomputed substrate, since the LoC transcript was recorded as a single audio file with multiple voices interleaved.
biographical_paragraph: Carolyn Miller is one of the named subjects of the joint Civil Rights History Project oral history at entry 12 (American Folklife Center accession AFC 2010/039) [src: 1]. This catalog page exists as a per-person index for Carolyn Miller; the substrate signature lives on the parent joint-interview page (see the AI's reading above) since the LoC transcript treats the joint conversation as a single recording. Independent biographical sourcing for Carolyn Miller is pending.

sources.title: Joint oral history at entry 12
